---
title: "Chapter 2- mortality"
output: pdf_document
date: "2026-03-19"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```
# Import posteriors from ecological model
```{r}
library(dplyr)

site.order <- c("JA", "CO", "BC" ,"CS" ,"CR" ,"MU", "VE" ,"PV" ,"MI", "JC", "CA" ,"SJ", "CV", "SE", "JG" ,"NP" ,"PP" ,"SS" ,"JF")
#laptop
#r_prior_df_eco <- readRDS("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-VirginiaTech/Github/arapaima_phenom_mod/priors/r_arena_priors.rds")
#r_hyperpriors  <- readRDS("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-VirginiaTech/Github/arapaima_phenom_mod/priors/r_hyperpriors.rds")
#beta_priors    <- readRDS("~/Library/CloudStorage/OneDrive-VirginiaTech/Github/arapaima_phenom_mod/priors/beta_priors.rds")

#desktop
r_prior_df_eco <- readRDS("C:/Users/emmah6/OneDrive - Virginia Tech/Github/arapaima_phenom_mod/priors/r_arena_priors.rds")
r_hyperpriors  <- readRDS("C:/Users/emmah6/OneDrive - Virginia Tech/Github/arapaima_phenom_mod/priors/r_hyperpriors.rds")
beta_priors    <- readRDS("C:/Users/emmah6/OneDrive - Virginia Tech/Github/arapaima_phenom_mod/priors/beta_priors.rds")

# Build full 19-arena frame
r_prior_df <- data.frame(arena = site.order) %>%
  left_join(r_prior_df_eco, by = "arena") %>%
  mutate(
    r_mean = ifelse(is.na(r_mean), r_hyperpriors$r_mean_est, r_mean),
    r_sd   = ifelse(is.na(r_sd),   1.5, r_sd * 2)
  )

r_prior    <- r_prior_df$r_mean
r_prior_sd <- r_prior_df$r_sd

r_obs    <- ifelse(prior_check$informed, 
                   r_prior,                    # Ch1 posterior mean
                   r_hyperpriors$r_mean_est)   # fallback to hyperprior mean

r_obs_sd <- ifelse(prior_check$informed,
                   r_prior_sd / 2,             # tighter than prior for informed
                   10)                         # effectively no constraint

```
# Rule compliance
using perceptions data from Cae 
``` {r compliance}
data4Emmav07 <- read.csv("data4Emmav07.csv")
cae_data <- data4Emmav07[,64:67]
cae_data[is.na(cae_data)] <- 0
cae_means <- cae_data %>%
  group_by(idses) %>%
  summarise_all(mean, na.rm = TRUE) 

codes <- readxl::read_xlsx("code_matching.xlsx")
ses_code <- unique(codes[,4:5])

per_comp <- merge(ses_code, cae_means, by.x= "SES", by.y = "idses")
# which rule should we focus on? for now- making an index by summing across the 3
per_comp <- per_comp %>% mutate(comp_index = compmgts + compmgtsea + compmgtla) 
per_comp2 <- per_comp[match(site.order, per_comp$SES.name),]

noncompliance_scale <- as.vector(scale(per_comp2[,6]))
```
# Poaching 
poaching data- Take average of top 5 poached lakes for all ses arenas
```{r poaching}
library(dplyr)
poach_raw <- read.csv("poaching_emma_lake.csv")
# combine poaching days for each lake from high and low water season
# take average of the top 5 lakes to create poaching index
lake_sum <- poach_raw %>% group_by(lago, SES) %>% summarise(total_poach = sum(days_poached))

result <- lake_sum %>%
  group_by(SES) %>%
  slice_max(order_by = total_poach, n = 5) %>%
  summarise(avg_top5_poach = mean(total_poach))
poach_scale <- as.vector(scale(result$avg_top5_poach)) 
```
# Ecological variables
```{r catch/count}
arenas <- 19 #all of them!
years <- 5 #2018-2022, just the last 5
count <- read.csv("smoothedcounts_v1.csv")
count <- count[,-1]
colnames(count) <- c("SES", 1999:2023)
last5 <- count[,c(1,21:25)]

catch= read.csv("catch_count_year_SES_12_3.csv")
quota_catch <- catch[,c(1,4,7,8)]
quota_catch <- quota_catch[-184,]
c1 <- quota_catch[, c(1,2,4)]
colnames(c1) <- c("SES", "year", "report_catchtotal")
missing_mam <- read.csv("catch_count_year_SES.csv")
mam_catch <- missing_mam[,c(1,6,9)]
c2<- rbind(c1, mam_catch)
c3<- dplyr::distinct(c2)
c3.5<- c3[-c(138,140),]
c4<- c3.5[order(c3.5$year, decreasing= FALSE),]
c5 <- tidyr::pivot_wider(c4, names_from = "year", values_from = "report_catchtotal")

site.order <- unique(c5$SES[1:19])
C <- last5[match(site.order, last5$SES), ]
C <- round(last5[,2:6]) # 2018:2022
C <- as.matrix(C)

E <- c5[1:19, c(1,21:25)]
E[is.na(E)] <- 0
E <- as.matrix(E[,-1])
storage.mode(E) <- "numeric"

#proportion of total lake area surveyed each year
prop_surveyed <- read.csv("propSES_surveyed_byyear_FIXED.csv")
prop_surveyed <- prop_surveyed[match(site.order, prop_surveyed$SES),] 
P <- prop_surveyed[,c(1,21:25)] 
P[is.na(P)] <- 0
P <- as.matrix(P[,-1])
storage.mode(P) <- "numeric"
```
```{r min water level}
library(dplyr)
min_wl_bySES <- read.csv("min_wl_ses.csv")
min_wl <- min_wl_bySES[1:19, -2]
colnames(min_wl) <- c("SES", 1995:2023)
min_wl <- min_wl[match(site.order, min_wl$SES), ]

######
Codigo  <- c("12351000", "13150003", "12872000")
Estacao <- c("FB", "CO", "MA")
stations <- data.frame(Codigo = Codigo, Estacao = Estacao)

# ANA station names as they appear in list_stations.xlsx, matched to Estacao codes
station_names <- data.frame(
  ANA.station = c("Fonte Boa", "Coari", "Maraa"),
  Estacao     = c("FB", "CO", "MA")
)

ses_lookup <- readxl::read_excel("list_stations.xlsx") %>%
  filter(!is.na(SES)) %>%
  left_join(station_names, by = "ANA.station") %>%
  select(SES, Estacao)

station_key <- data.frame(
  Estacao    = Estacao,
  station_id = seq_along(Estacao)
)

station_id <- min_wl %>%
  mutate(SES = site.order) %>%
  left_join(ses_lookup, by = "SES") %>%
  left_join(station_key, by= "Estacao") %>%
  pull(station_id)

Wl_min_raw <- as.matrix(
  min_wl[1:19, ] %>%
    left_join(ses_lookup, by = "SES") %>%
    distinct(Estacao, .keep_all = TRUE) %>%
    slice(match(station_key$Estacao, Estacao)) %>%
    select(as.character(2016:2020)))

rownames(Wl_min_raw) <- station_key$Estacao
Wl_min_scaled <- t(scale(t(Wl_min_raw)))
```
```{r flooded forest}
library(dplyr)
hess_habs <- readxl::read_xls("hess_4k_pixels.xls")
hess <- hess_habs %>% mutate(totalpix = (C_0+C_1+C_11+C_13+C_21+C_33+C_44+C_51+C_67+C_77+C_88+C_89+C_99+C_200+C_255),
                        p_floodforest= ((C_77+C_89+C_99)/totalpix))
hess_trim <- hess[2:20,c(2,23)]
colnames(hess_trim) <- c("SES", "p_ff")
hess_trim <- hess_trim %>% mutate(pct_ff = p_ff *100)
hess_tiny <- hess_trim[,c(1,3)]
colnames(hess_tiny) <- c("SES", "Percent area flooded forest")

hess_final <- na.omit(hess_tiny[match(site.order, hess_tiny$SES), ])


max_wl_bySES <- read.csv("max_wl_bySES.csv")
max_wl <- max_wl_bySES[1:19, c(1,25:29)]
colnames(max_wl) <- c( "SES", 2016:2020)
Wl_max_raw <- max_wl[match(site.order, max_wl$SES), ]

Wl_max_plus <- left_join(Wl_max_raw, hess_tiny, by = "SES")
# Step 3: multiply each year column by the percent area flooded forest
year_cols <- as.character(2016:2020)
Wl_flood <- Wl_max_plus
Wl_flood[, year_cols] <- Wl_max_plus[, year_cols] * 
                          (Wl_max_plus$`Percent area flooded forest` / 100)

ff_matrix <- as.matrix(Wl_flood[, year_cols])
rownames(ff_matrix) <- Wl_flood$SES
ff_scaled <- t(scale(t(ff_matrix)))

```
# Model
```{r data bundle/initial sim}
N_start_realistic <- numeric(arenas)

for(j in 1:arenas) {
  obs_counts <- C[j, ]
  max_count <- max(obs_counts, na.rm=TRUE)
  N_start_realistic[j] <- max_count * 4
} 
data.bundle <- list(
  C           = C,
  E           = E,
  p_area      = P,
  Minw        = Wl_min_scaled,
  Ff          = ff_scaled,
  arenas      = arenas,
  years       = years,
  station_id  = station_id,
  N_start     = N_start_realistic,
  r_mean_prior     = r_hyperpriors$r_mean_est,
  r_mean_prior_sd  = r_hyperpriors$r_mean_sd * 2,
  sigma_r_prior    = r_hyperpriors$sigma_r_est,
  sigma_r_prior_sd = r_hyperpriors$sigma_r_sd * 2,
  beta1_prior      = beta_priors$beta1_mean,
  beta1_prior_sd   = beta_priors$beta1_sd * 2,
  beta3_prior      = beta_priors$beta3_mean,
  beta3_prior_sd   = beta_priors$beta3_sd * 2,
  beta6_prior      = beta_priors$beta6_mean,
  beta6_prior_sd   = beta_priors$beta6_sd * 2,
  r_obs            = r_obs,     
  r_obs_sd         = r_obs_sd   
)

# Simulate reasonable parameter values
p_sim <- 0.7  # Fix detection at 0.7
beta6_sim <- 0.5  # Fix availability parameter at 0.5

# Initialize matrices
N_sim <- matrix(NA, nrow = arenas, ncol = years)
M_sim <- matrix(NA, nrow = arenas, ncol = years)

for (j in 1:arenas) {
  for (t in 1:years) {
    
    # Back-calculate M from C
    # C ~ Binomial(M, p_detect)
    # So M ~ C / p_detect
    if (C[j, t] > 0) {
      M_sim[j, t] <- max(round(C[j, t] / p_sim), C[j, t] + 5)
    } else {
      # When count is 0, assume small population was present but not detected
      # Use harvest as a clue - if harvest occurred, population must have existed
      if (E[j, t] > 0) {
        M_sim[j, t] <- max(round(E[j, t] * 1.5), 20)
      } else {
        M_sim[j, t] <- round(runif(1, 10, 50))
      }
    }
    
    # Back-calculate N from M
    # M ~ Binomial(N, w) where w = ilogit(-beta6 * p_area)
    w_sim <- 1 / (1 + exp(beta6_sim * P[j, t]))
    w_sim <- max(w_sim, 0.1)  # Prevent division by very small numbers
    
    N_sim[j, t] <- max(round(M_sim[j, t] / w_sim), M_sim[j, t] + 10)
    
    # Step 3: Ensure N can support harvest
    # Population must be large enough to sustain the harvest
    if (E[j, t] > 0) {
      N_min_for_harvest <- E[j, t] * 2  # Population should be at least 2x harvest
      N_sim[j, t] <- max(N_sim[j, t], N_min_for_harvest)
      # Also update M to maintain hierarchy
      M_sim[j, t] <- max(M_sim[j, t], round(N_min_for_harvest * 0.6))
    }
  }
}

# Final validation and corrections

# Ensure all values are positive integers
N_sim <- round(pmax(N_sim, 10))
M_sim <- round(pmax(M_sim, 5))

# Enforce hierarchy: N >= M >= C
for (j in 1:arenas) {
  for (t in 1:years) {
    # Ensure M <= N
    if (M_sim[j, t] > N_sim[j, t]) {
      N_sim[j, t] <- M_sim[j, t] + 10
    }
    
    # Ensure C <= M
    if (C[j, t] > M_sim[j, t]) {
      M_sim[j, t] <- C[j, t] + 5
      N_sim[j, t] <- max(N_sim[j, t], M_sim[j, t] + 10)
    }
  }
}

U_sim <- matrix(NA, nrow = arenas, ncol = years)
p_unrep_start <- 0.05
logit_start   <- log(p_unrep_start / (1 - p_unrep_start))  # -2.944

# Rebuild U_sim consistent with p_unrep_start
U_sim <- matrix(NA, nrow = arenas, ncol = years)
for(j in 1:arenas) {
  for(t in 2:years) {
    avail      <- max(N_sim[j,t-1] - E[j,t], 0)
    U_sim[j,t] <- min(round(avail * p_unrep_start), avail)
  }
}

# Convert to numeric matrices (required by JAGS)
storage.mode(N_sim) <- "numeric"
storage.mode(M_sim) <- "numeric"
storage.mode(U_sim) <- "numeric"
```
3 tier model
```{r JAGS full}
library(rjags)
library(jagsUI)

modfile <- tempfile()
writeLines("
model {
  #---------------------------------------------------
  # Priors
  #---------------------------------------------------
  r_mean  ~ dnorm(r_mean_prior, 1/pow(r_mean_prior_sd, 2))
  sigma_r ~ dnorm(sigma_r_prior, 1/pow(sigma_r_prior_sd, 2))T(0,)
  tau_r   <- 1/pow(sigma_r, 2)

  beta1 ~ dnorm(beta1_prior, 1/pow(beta1_prior_sd, 2))
  beta3 ~ dnorm(beta3_prior, 1/pow(beta3_prior_sd, 2))
  beta6 ~ dnorm(beta6_prior, 1/pow(beta6_prior_sd, 2))T(0,)

  mu_unrep    ~ dnorm(0, 1/pow(1.5, 2))
  sigma_unrep ~ dnorm(0, 1/pow(1, 2))T(0,)
  tau_unrep   <- 1/pow(sigma_unrep, 2)
  
#---------------------------------------------------
# Ecological Process model
#---------------------------------------------------
for (j in 1:arenas) {
      N[j,1] ~ dpois(N_start[j]) 
      r[j] ~ dnorm(r_mean, tau_r)
      r_obs[j] ~ dnorm(r[j], 1/pow(r_obs_sd[j], 2)) #arena specific informing 
      
      alpha_unrep[j] ~ dnorm(mu_unrep, tau_unrep)  # arena-level baseline iuu
      logit(p_unrep[j]) <- alpha_unrep[j] 
    
    for (t in 2:(years)){
      
      U[j,t] ~ dbin(p_unrep[j], N[j,t-1]-E[j,t]) 
      #binomial(probability of unreported fishing, number of fish not already reported as catch)

      Ftot[j,t] <- E[j,t] + U[j,t] # legal + rule breaking and poaching 
      
      N_post_harvest[j,t] <- N[j,t-1] - Ftot[j,t]
      
      # Growth to next year
     growth_rate[j,t] <- r[j] + 
     (beta1 * Minw[station_id[j],t]) + 
     (beta3 * Ff[j,t]) 
      
      N_expected[j,t] <- N_post_harvest[j,t] * exp(growth_rate[j,t])
      N[j,t] ~ dpois(N_expected[j,t])
    }
}
  #---------------------------------------------------
  # Proportion of the population actually sampled
  #---------------------------------------------------
 for (j in 1:arenas){
    for (t in 1:years){
      w[j,t] <- ilogit(-beta6 * p_area[j,t]) 
      M[j,t] ~ dbin(w[j,t], N[j,t])
    }
  }
  #---------------------------------------------------
  # Observation model for C (counts) - regular binomial 
  #---------------------------------------------------
    p_obs ~ dbeta(14,6)

for (j in 1:arenas) {
    for (t in 1:years){
      
      C[j,t] ~ dbin(p_obs , M[j,t])
    }
  }
  
  #---------------------------------------------------
  # Derived quantities
  #---------------------------------------------------
  for (j in 1:arenas) {
    for (t in 1:(years-1)) {
    lambda[j,t+1] <- N[j,t+1]/N[j,t]
    }
  }
}

", con = modfile)

# Initialization function
inits <- function() {
  
  list(
    N           = N_sim,
    M           = M_sim,
    U           = U_sim,
    r_mean      = rnorm(1, r_hyperpriors$r_mean_est, 0.02),
    sigma_r     = runif(1, 0.1, 0.3),
    r           = rnorm(arenas, r_hyperpriors$r_mean_est, 0.02),
    beta1       = rnorm(1, beta_priors$beta1_mean, 0.05),
    beta3       = rnorm(1, beta_priors$beta3_mean, 0.05),
    beta6       = runif(1, 0.15, 0.25),
    mu_unrep    = rnorm(1, logit_start, 0.2),
    sigma_unrep = runif(1, 0.1, 0.3),
    alpha_unrep = rep(logit_start, arenas)
  )
}

# Parameters to monitor
parameters <- c("beta1", "beta3", "beta6", "mu_unrep", "sigma_unrep",
                "p_unrep", "lambda", "N", "r")

out <- jags(data = data.bundle,
            inits = inits,
            parameters.to.save = parameters,
            model.file = modfile,
            n.chains = 3,
            n.adapt = 30000,
            n.iter = 200000,
            n.burnin = 100000,
            n.thin = 75,
            parallel = TRUE)

traceplot(out, parameters = parameters)
```
Diagnostics
```{r diagnostics, echo=FALSE}
#install.packages("jagshelper")
library(jagshelper)

key_params <- c("beta1", "beta3", "beta6", "p_unrep", "U")

for (param in key_params) {
  if (param %in% rownames(out$summary)) {
    cat("\n", param, ":\n", sep="")
    param_summary <- out$summary[param, ]
    print(round(param_summary, 4))
  } else {
    cat("\n", param, ": NOT FOUND\n", sep="")
  }
}

check_neff(out, 200)

check_Rhat(out)

if ("mean" %in% names(out)) {
  cat("\nParameter means:\n")
  for (param in key_params) {
    if (param %in% names(out$mean)) {
      cat(sprintf("  %-12s = %8.4f\n", param, out$mean[[param]]))
    }
  }
}

if ("sd" %in% names(out)) {
  cat("\nParameter SDs:\n")
  for (param in key_params) {
    if (param %in% names(out$sd)) {
      cat(sprintf("  %-12s = %8.4f\n", param, out$sd[[param]]))
    }
  }
}

# Build clean p_unrep summary
p_unrep_means <- out$mean$p_unrep
p_unrep_sds   <- out$sd$p_unrep

p_unrep_final <- data.frame(
  arena        = site.order,
  informed     = prior_check$informed,
  p_unrep_mean = round(p_unrep_means, 4),
  p_unrep_sd   = round(p_unrep_sds, 4),
  p_unrep_2.5  = round(out$q2.5$p_unrep, 4),
  p_unrep_97.5 = round(out$q97.5$p_unrep, 4)
) %>% arrange(desc(p_unrep_mean))

p_unrep_final


# Check convergence across all N nodes
n_rhats <- out$summary[grep("^N\\[", rownames(out$summary)), "Rhat"]
cat("\nN node convergence:\n")
cat("Max Rhat:   ", round(max(n_rhats), 4), "\n")
cat("Mean Rhat:  ", round(mean(n_rhats), 4), "\n")
cat("N Rhat > 1.1:", sum(n_rhats > 1.1), "\n")

# Save outputs for Chapter 3
p_unrep_ch3 <- p_unrep_final
lambda_cols  <- grep("^lambda", rownames(out$summary), value = TRUE)
lambda_ch3   <- data.frame(
  param        = lambda_cols,
  arena        = site.order[as.integer(sub("lambda\\[(\\d+),.*", "\\1", lambda_cols))],
  year         = as.integer(sub("lambda\\[\\d+,(\\d+)\\]", "\\1", lambda_cols)),
  lambda_mean  = round(out$summary[lambda_cols, "mean"], 4),
  lambda_sd    = round(out$summary[lambda_cols, "sd"], 4),
  lambda_2.5   = round(out$summary[lambda_cols, "2.5%"], 4),
  lambda_97.5  = round(out$summary[lambda_cols, "97.5%"], 4)
)

saveRDS(p_unrep_ch3, "priors/p_unrep_ch3.rds") #verify they save on desktop
saveRDS(lambda_ch3,  "priors/lambda_ch3.rds")

```
Plots
```{r plots}
library(bayesplot)
library(ggplot2)
library(tidyverse)
library(stringr)

posterior <- as.matrix(out$samples)

# Interval plots
beta_params <- c("beta1", "beta3")

mcmc_intervals(posterior, pars = beta_params)+
  scale_y_discrete(labels = c(
    "beta1" = "Drought Severity",
    "beta3" = "Flooded Forest Cover"
  ))+
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Posterior estimates for covariate effects",
       subtitle = "50% and 95% credible intervals")

#lambda trends
lambda_cols <- grep("lambda", colnames(posterior), value = TRUE)

lambda_df <- posterior[, lambda_cols] %>%
  as.data.frame() %>%
  # Summarize posterior to median + credible intervals per parameter
  summarise(across(everything(), list(
    median = ~median(.),
    lower  = ~quantile(., 0.025),
    upper  = ~quantile(., 0.975)
  ))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to  = c("param", ".value"),
               names_pattern = "(.+)_(median|lower|upper)") %>%
  # Parse arena and year out of the parameter name
  # Adjust regex to match your naming convention e.g. "lambda[year,arena]"
  mutate(
    arena = str_extract(param, "(?<=,)\\d+(?=\\])") %>% as.integer(),
    year  = str_extract(param, "(?<=\\[)\\d+") %>% as.integer()
  )

arena_lookup <- c(
  "1"  = "JA",
  "2"  = "CO",
  "3"  = "BC",
  "4"  = "CS",
  "5"  = "CR",
  "6"  = "MU",
  "7"  = "VE",
  "8"  = "PV",
  "9"  = "MI",
  "10" = "JC",
  "11" = "CA",
  "12" = "SJ",
  "13" = "CV",
  "14" = "SE",
  "15" = "JG",
  "16" = "NP",
  "17" = "PP",
  "18" = "SS",
  "19" = "JF"
)


year_lookup <- setNames(2018:2022, 1:years)

lambda_df <- as.data.frame(posterior) %>%
  select(starts_with("lambda")) %>%
  summarise(across(everything(), list(
    median = ~median(.),
    lower  = ~quantile(., 0.025),
    upper  = ~quantile(., 0.975)
  ))) %>%
  pivot_longer(everything(),
               names_to  = c("param", ".value"),
               names_pattern = "(.+)_(median|lower|upper)") %>%
  mutate(
    arena_idx = as.integer(str_extract(param, "(?<=\\[)\\d+")),
    year_idx  = as.integer(str_extract(param, "(?<=,)\\d+(?=\\])")),
    arena     = arena_lookup[as.character(arena_idx)],
    year      = year_lookup[as.character(year_idx)]
  ) %>%
  filter(!is.na(arena) & !is.na(year))

ggplot(lambda_df, aes(x = year, y = median,
                      group = arena, color = arena)) +
  geom_line() +
  geom_ribbon(aes(ymin = lower, ymax = upper, fill = arena),
              alpha = 0.15, color = NA) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_color_viridis_d() +
  scale_fill_viridis_d() +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = 2019:2022) +
  labs(title = "Annual population growth rate (lambda) by SES arena",
       x     = "Year",
       y     = "Lambda",
       color = "Arena",
       fill  = "Arena") +
  theme_minimal() +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1))


ratio_df <- data.frame(
  arena      = site.order,
  mean_ratio = sapply(1:arenas, function(j) {
    ratios <- E[j, 2:years] / pmax(C[j, 1:(years-1)], 1)
    ratios[is.infinite(ratios)] <- NA
    mean(ratios, na.rm = TRUE)
  })
)

validation_df <- p_unrep_final %>%
  left_join(ratio_df, by = "arena")

cat("\nValidation df columns:", names(validation_df), "\n")
cat("\nSpearman correlation p_unrep vs harvest/count ratio:\n")
cat(round(cor(validation_df$p_unrep_mean,
              validation_df$mean_ratio,
              method = "spearman",
              use    = "complete.obs"), 3), "\n")


# informed vs uninformed p_unrep estimates
ggplot(validation_df, aes(x     = mean_ratio,
                           y     = p_unrep_mean,
                           color = informed,
                           label = arena)) +
  geom_point(aes(size = 1/p_unrep_sd)) +
  geom_errorbar(aes(ymin = p_unrep_2.5, ymax = p_unrep_97.5),
                width = 0.02, alpha = 0.5) +
  geom_text_repel(size = 3) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 1, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "orange", "TRUE" = "steelblue"),
                     labels = c("FALSE" = "Uninformed", "TRUE" = "Informed")) +
  labs(x     = "Mean harvest / prior year count",
       y     = "Estimated p_unrep",
       color = "Prior type",
       size  = "Certainty",
       title = "Model validation: p_unrep vs independent harvest pressure index") +
  theme_minimal()
```
#### Nimble versions 
```{r Nimble}
library(nimble)

nimble_code <- nimbleCode({
  r_mean      ~ dnorm(0.05, sd = 1.5)
  sigma_r     ~ dnorm(0, sd = 1.5)        
  tau_r       <- 1/pow(sigma_r, 2)
  
  beta1       ~ dnorm(beta1_prior, sd = beta1_prior_sd)
  beta3       ~ dnorm(beta3_prior, sd = beta3_prior_sd)
  beta5       ~ dnorm(0.5, sd = 1.5)     
  beta7       ~ dnorm(0.5, sd = 1.5)      
  #beta6       ~ dnorm(0.5, sd = 2)  
  
  mu_unrep    ~ dnorm(0, sd = 1.5)
  sigma_unrep ~ dnorm(0, sd = 1)          
  tau_unrep   <- 1/pow(sigma_unrep, 2)
  
# Ecological Process model
    for (j in 1:arenas) {
      N[j,1] ~ dpois(N_start[j]) 
      r[j] ~ dnorm(r_mean, sigma_r) 
      alpha_unrep[j] ~ dnorm(mu_unrep, sigma_unrep)  # arena-level baseline iuu
      logit(p_unrep[j]) <- alpha_unrep[j] + beta5*noncompliance[j] + beta7*poaching[j] 
          #inform p.unreported with compliance + poaching
    
    for (t in 2:(years)){
      
      U[j,t] ~ dbin(p_unrep[j], N[j,t-1]-E[j,t]) 
      #binomial(probability of unreported fishing, number of fish not already reported as catch)

      Ftot[j,t] <- E[j,t] + U[j,t] # legal + rule breaking and poaching 
      
      N_post_harvest[j,t] <- N[j,t-1] - Ftot[j,t]
      
      # Growth to next year
     growth_rate[j,t] <- r[j] + 
     (beta1 * Minw[station_id[j],t]) + 
     (beta3 * Ff[j,t]) 
      
      N_expected[j,t] <- N_post_harvest[j,t] * exp(growth_rate[j,t])
      N[j,t] ~ dpois(N_expected[j,t])
    }
}

  # Proportion of the population actually sampled
    for (j in 1:arenas){
    for (t in 1:years){
      w[j,t] <- ilogit(-beta6_fixed * p_area[j,t]) 
      M[j,t] ~ dbin(w[j,t], N[j,t])
    }
  }

  # Observation model for C (counts) - regular binomial 

    p_obs ~ dbeta(14,6)

    for (j in 1:arenas) {
    for (t in 1:years){
      
      C[j,t] ~ dbin(p_obs , M[j,t])
    }
  }
  

  # Derived quantities
    for (j in 1:arenas) {
    for (t in 1:(years-1)) {
    lambda[j,t+1] <- N[j,t+1]/N[j,t]
    }
  }
})

nimble_model <- nimbleModel(
  code    = nimble_code,
  data    = list(C = C, E = E, p_area = P, Minw = Wl_min_scaled,
                 Ff = ff_scaled, noncompliance = noncompliance_scale,
                 poaching = poach_scale),
  constants = list(
  arenas          = arenas,
  years           = years,
  station_id      = station_id,
  N_start         = N_start_realistic,
  r_prior         = r_prior,
  r_prior_sd      = r_prior_sd,
  r_mean_prior    = r_hyperpriors$r_mean_est,
  r_mean_prior_sd = r_hyperpriors$r_mean_sd * 2,
  sigma_r_prior   = r_hyperpriors$sigma_r_est,
  sigma_r_prior_sd = r_hyperpriors$sigma_r_sd * 2,
  beta1_prior     = beta_priors$beta1_mean,
  beta1_prior_sd  = beta_priors$beta1_sd * 2,
  beta3_prior     = beta_priors$beta3_mean,
  beta3_prior_sd  = beta_priors$beta3_sd * 2,
  beta6_fixed     = beta_priors$beta6_fixed
),
  inits   = list(
    N           = N_sim,
    M           = M_sim,
    U           = U_sim,
    r_mean      = 0.05,
    sigma_r     = 0.2,
    r           = rep(0.05, arenas),
    beta1       = 0,
    beta3       = 0,
    beta5       = 0.5,
   # beta6       = 0.2,
    beta7       = 0.5,
    mu_unrep    = 0,
    sigma_unrep = 0.3,
    alpha_unrep = rep(0, arenas),
    p_obs       = 0.7
  )
)
# Configure joint sampler on N and U together
conf <- configureMCMC(nimble_model)
conf$removeSamplers(c("N", "U"))

for(j in 1:arenas) {
  conf$addSampler(target = paste0("N[", j, ", 1]"), type = "slice")
  for(t in 2:years) {
    # Sample U and N jointly at each time step
    conf$addSampler(target = c(paste0("U[", j, ",", t, "]"),
                               paste0("N[", j, ",", t, "]")),
                    type = "AF_slice")  # AF_slice handles mixed discrete/continuous
  }
}


mcmc <- buildMCMC(conf)
compiled_model <- compileNimble(nimble_model)
compiled_mcmc  <- compileNimble(mcmc, project = nimble_model)

samples <- runMCMC(compiled_mcmc,
                   niter   = 200000,
                   nburnin = 100000,
                   thin    = 75,
                   nchains = 3)
library(coda)
samples_coda <- as.mcmc.list(lapply(samples, as.mcmc))
```
nimble outputs
```{r}
library(coda)
library(bayesplot)
library(ggplot2)

posterior_matrix <- as.matrix(samples_coda)

key_params <- c("beta1", "beta3", "beta5", "beta7","mu_unrep", "sigma_unrep")

# Rhat and n.eff
gelman <- gelman.diag(samples_coda, multivariate = FALSE)
eff    <- effectiveSize(samples_coda)

cat("=== Convergence diagnostics ===\n")
for(p in key_params) {
  idx <- grep(paste0("^", p, "$"), rownames(gelman$psrf))
  if(length(idx) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("%-15s Rhat: %.4f   n.eff: %.0f\n",
                p, gelman$psrf[idx, 1], eff[idx]))
  }
}

# Traceplots
mcmc_trace(posterior_matrix, pars = key_params)

# Posterior intervals
mcmc_intervals(posterior_matrix, pars = c("beta1", "beta3")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Posterior estimates for growth covariates")

# Density plots
mcmc_areas(posterior_matrix, pars = key_params, prob = 0.95) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")

# Posterior summary table
sum_stats <- summary(samples_coda)
print(round(sum_stats$statistics[key_params, ], 4))
print(round(sum_stats$quantiles[key_params, ], 4))
```
Model 2 - no covariates
```{r}
nimble_code_m2 <- nimbleCode({
  r_mean      ~ dnorm(r_mean_prior, sd = r_mean_prior_sd)
  sigma_r     ~ T(dnorm(sigma_r_prior, sd = sigma_r_prior_sd), 0, Inf)
  tau_r       <- 1/pow(sigma_r, 2)
  beta1       ~ dnorm(beta1_prior, sd = beta1_prior_sd)
  beta3       ~ dnorm(beta3_prior, sd = beta3_prior_sd)
  
  # Single global p_unrep - no covariates yet
  mu_unrep    ~ dnorm(0, sd = 1.5)
  sigma_unrep ~ T(dnorm(0, sd = 1), 0, Inf)

  for(j in 1:arenas) {
    r[j]           ~ dnorm(r_prior[j], sd = r_prior_sd[j])
    N[j,1]         ~ dpois(N_start[j])
    alpha_unrep[j] ~ dnorm(mu_unrep, sd = sigma_unrep)
    logit(p_unrep[j]) <- alpha_unrep[j]  # no covariates

    for(t in 2:years) {
      U[j,t]              ~ dbin(p_unrep[j], N[j,t-1] - E[j,t])
      Ftot[j,t]           <- E[j,t] + U[j,t]
      N_post_harvest[j,t] <- N[j,t-1] - Ftot[j,t]
      growth_rate[j,t]    <- r[j] + 
                             beta1*Minw[station_id[j],t] + 
                             beta3*Ff[j,t]
      N_expected[j,t]     <- N_post_harvest[j,t] * exp(growth_rate[j,t])
      N[j,t]              ~ dpois(N_expected[j,t])
    }
  }

  for(j in 1:arenas) {
    for(t in 1:years) {
      w[j,t] <- ilogit(-beta6_fixed * p_area[j,t])
      M[j,t] ~ dbin(w[j,t], N[j,t])
      C[j,t] ~ dbin(p_obs, M[j,t])
    }
  }

  p_obs ~ dbeta(14, 6)

  for(j in 1:arenas) {
    for(t in 2:years) {
      lambda[j,t] <- N[j,t] / N[j,t-1]
    }
  }
})

nimble_model_m2 <- nimbleModel(
  code    = nimble_code_m2,
  data    = list(C = C, E = E, p_area = P, Minw = Wl_min_scaled,
                 Ff = ff_scaled, noncompliance = noncompliance_scale,
                 poaching = poach_scale),
  constants = list(
  arenas          = arenas,
  years           = years,
  station_id      = station_id,
  N_start         = N_start_realistic,
  r_prior         = r_prior,
  r_prior_sd      = r_prior_sd,
  r_mean_prior    = r_hyperpriors$r_mean_est,
  r_mean_prior_sd = r_hyperpriors$r_mean_sd * 2,
  sigma_r_prior   = r_hyperpriors$sigma_r_est,
  sigma_r_prior_sd = r_hyperpriors$sigma_r_sd * 2,
  beta1_prior     = beta_priors$beta1_mean,
  beta1_prior_sd  = beta_priors$beta1_sd * 2,
  beta3_prior     = beta_priors$beta3_mean,
  beta3_prior_sd  = beta_priors$beta3_sd * 2,
  beta6_fixed     = beta_priors$beta6_fixed
),
  inits   = list(
    N           = N_sim,
    M           = M_sim,
    U           = U_sim,
    r_mean      = 0.05,
    sigma_r     = 0.2,
    r           = rep(0.05, arenas),
    beta1       = 0,
    beta3       = 0,
    mu_unrep    = 0,
    sigma_unrep = 0.3,
    alpha_unrep = rep(0, arenas),
    p_obs       = 0.7
  )
)
# Configure joint sampler on N and U together
conf2 <- configureMCMC(nimble_model_m2)
conf2$removeSamplers(c("N", "U"))

for(j in 1:arenas) {
  conf2$addSampler(target = paste0("N[", j, ", 1]"), type = "slice")
  for(t in 2:years) {
    # Sample U and N jointly at each time step
    conf2$addSampler(target = c(paste0("U[", j, ",", t, "]"),
                               paste0("N[", j, ",", t, "]")),
                    type = "AF_slice")
  }
}


mcmc2 <- buildMCMC(conf2)
compiled_model2 <- compileNimble(nimble_model_m2)
compiled_mcmc2  <- compileNimble(mcmc2, project = nimble_model_m2)

samples2 <- runMCMC(compiled_mcmc2,
                   niter   = 200000,
                   nburnin = 100000,
                   thin    = 75,
                   nchains = 3)
library(coda)
samples_coda2 <- as.mcmc.list(lapply(samples2, as.mcmc))

#Outputs
posterior_matrix2 <- as.matrix(samples_coda2)

key_params2 <- c("beta1", "beta3","mu_unrep", "sigma_unrep")

# Rhat and n.eff
gelman2 <- gelman.diag(samples_coda2, multivariate = FALSE)
eff2    <- effectiveSize(samples_coda2)

cat("=== Convergence diagnostics ===\n")
for(p in key_params2) {
  idx <- grep(paste0("^", p, "$"), rownames(gelman2$psrf))
  if(length(idx) > 0) {
    cat(sprintf("%-15s Rhat: %.4f   n.eff: %.0f\n",
                p, gelman2$psrf[idx, 1], eff2[idx]))
  }
}

# Traceplots
mcmc_trace(posterior_matrix2, pars = key_params2)

# Posterior intervals
mcmc_intervals(posterior_matrix2, pars = c("beta1", "beta3", "mu_unrep")) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red") +
  labs(title = "Posterior estimates for growth covariates")

# Density plots
mcmc_areas(posterior_matrix2, pars = key_params2, prob = 0.95) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 0, linetype = "dashed", color = "red")

# Posterior summary table
sum_stats2 <- summary(samples_coda2)
print(round(sum_stats2$statistics[key_params2, ], 4))
print(round(sum_stats2$quantiles[key_params2, ], 4))
```
